name: Savory Bread Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and celery to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 6-8 minutes until tender.
3. Stir in the poultry seasoning, salt, and pepper.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the crutons.
5. Spoon the mixture into a buttered 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
7. Uncover and bake for another 10 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
